original_image_tags: Official crest of the United Kingdom.

elements.description: Official letterhead featuring a circular royal coat of arms emblem. The page includes typed text, redacted fields, handwritten annotations, and a declassification stamp at the bottom right labeled 'Declassified Case: NWR 90986 Date: 14-14-2026'.

judge.reason: Description B states specific verbatim text ('Declassified Case: NWR 90986 Date: 14-14-2026') that Description A does not mention at all, indicating a hallucination of specific content.
